overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character travels from a covered commercial walkway, across a busy intersection, and into a narrow graffiti-covered alleyway. The scene features dense urban architecture with holographic billboards, neon signage, and moderate vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial pedestrian walkway with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pedestrian walkway beneath holographic billboards and neon signs

entered.detail: large floating digital billboard displaying advertisements above the street
secondary digital billboard mounted on building facade
continuous purple neon light strip running along the edge of the building
commercial storefront with illuminated blue signage reading CIRRUS
metal girder bridge carrying elevated traffic above the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered commercial pedestrian street lined with shops and illuminated by numerous holographic billboards and neon signs. The walkway is sheltered by an overhead transit structure, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction and vehicles visible on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street under elevated transit structures

events.description: character begins turning right toward the intersection crosswalk
waiting for vehicles to pass before stepping onto the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and preparing to cross the busy street

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past on the street, headlights on

entered.detail: bright red neon sign reading ELECTRONIC PARTS mounted on building wall
industrial cylindrical storage tank with blue stripes
tall commercial building with multiple floors and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the open street, passing an industrial cylindrical tank and a neon Electronic Parts sign. The environment opens up as the character approaches a major intersection, with multi-level buildings lining both sides. The character slows and turns right, waiting for traffic before crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow graffiti-covered back alley with nightclub entrance

events.description: turns off main street into narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls
tall buildings and walls block remaining sky view as entering deeper alley

agents.ego_description: turning into and walking down the narrow alleyway toward a dead end

notable_agents.action: person standing near graffiti-covered wall, facing away from camera

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful spray paint tags and street art
neon sign for WIDE OPEN club with pink and green lighting
green dumpsters and trash containers against the wall
chain link fence blocking the end of the alleyway

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the intersection and turns into a narrow alleyway, leaving the busy street behind. The environment shifts to an enclosed space with graffiti-covered walls, neon club signage, and sparse pedestrian presence. The character walks toward a dead end blocked by a metal fence, with trash bins and tagged walls lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, commercial pedestrian thoroughfare into the secluded depths of a gritty urban alleyway. It begins under a sheltered transit structure, moving past a series of holographic billboards and neon-lit shops while following the flow of pedestrian traffic. As the character emerges from the cover of the walkway, the environment opens up into a wide street featuring industrial tanks and glowing signage before the camera slows to a halt at a bustling multi-level intersection. The scene then shifts abruptly as the character crosses the road and turns away from the city lights, entering a narrow, enclosed space defined by graffiti-covered walls and neon club signs. Finally, the path tightens further, leading past trash bins and tagged surfaces toward a dead end blocked by a metal fence.
